comment: RAG corpus manifest. Only openly licensed / public-domain sources (docs/rag-constraints.md). US federal government content is public domain. Mix is intentionally ~70% autism / ~30% other neurodevelopmental conditions; keep that ratio when adding sources. PMC URLs are fetched via the E-utilities efetch API, not scraped (see ingest.py).
